title: InfiniteBuckets
description: Infinite water, lava, and sponge buckets for 1.21+. Features MiniMessage support, Folia compatibility, and deep integration with WorldGuard, Towny, and GriefPrevention.
body:
# 🪣 InfiniteBuckets: Modern Fluid Management for 1.21+

**Give your players endless fluids with safe, configurable infinite buckets. Optimized for Paper, Spigot, and Folia.**

InfiniteBuckets is a premium-grade utility suite that moves beyond simple infinite water. It features **MiniMessage** branding, per-bucket permissions, and unique **Drain Modes (Sponge)**—all while respecting your server's protection plugins like WorldGuard and GriefPrevention.

---

### 🛡️ Support the Project via CloudExa Hosting
Support our development by using our affiliate link! Use our special coupon code for **10% OFF** your hosting.
[![Support Us](https://i.ibb.co/TDvjLX3q/test.png)](https://billing.cloudexa-hosting.com/aff.php?aff=41)

---

## ✨ Feature Highlights

* 💧 **Infinite Water & Lava** — Customizable endless sources that never run out.
* 🧽 **Advanced Sponge Mode** — Create "Drain Buckets" that clear water/lava in a radius (including waterlogged blocks).
* 🌈 **MiniMessage Support** — Full support for gradients, hex colors, and custom lore using modern formatting.
* 🛡️ **Protection Aware** — Automatically respects build rules for **WorldGuard, GriefPrevention, Towny, Lands, PlotSquared,** and more.
* 🚀 **Folia Compatible** — Built from the ground up to handle multi-threaded server environments.
* 🏗️ **Waterlog Support** — Smart placement logic that correctly waterlogs blocks when right-clicked.

---

## 🛠️ Commands & Quick Start
* **`/infb give <player> <id>`** — Grant a specific infinite bucket.
* **`/infb reload`** — Instantly refresh `config.yml` and `buckets.yml` without a restart.
* **`/infb help`** — View all admin commands and permissions.

---

## ⚙️ Fully Customizable Buckets
Every bucket is defined in `buckets.yml`. You can create:
1. **Vanilla-Style:** Endless placement of any fluid.
2. **Drain-Area:** A portable sponge that clears fluids in a 5x5 or larger radius.
3. **Custom Permissions:** Perfect for donor ranks (e.g., `infb.use.lava`).

---

## 📥 Requirements & Installation
1. Ensure you are running **Paper/Folia 1.21+** and **Java 17+**.
2. Drop the `.jar` into your `plugins` folder.
3. Configure your custom buckets in `buckets.yml`.

> 📖 **Need Help?** > Looking for deep technical documentation or API implementation?  
> 👉 **[Visit the Official Wiki Here](https://busybeedev.net/docs/infinitebuckets/introduction)**

---
*Optimized for Minecraft 1.21+ | Infinite Water Bucket | Infinite Lava | Folia Compatible | PaperMC Utility*
